calendar.matters:
Motion For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSEPH CHAN's Motion For Monetary Sanctions.

Off calendar. Moving party has not filed a proof of service showing service on Stripe. In addition, moving party's declaration does not attach the documents served on Stripe that the declaration states were attached. The court has no way of ascertaining from these papers whether service on Stripe was proper or whether moving party is entitled to the relief sought.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Braden Woods; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20am and concluding at 9:23am.

Plaintiff Joseph Wai-Lung Chan appearing via Zoom.
Defendant Khermani LLC not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff Joseph Wai-Lnch Chan.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Joseph Wai-Lung Chan, and against Defendant Khermani LLC as follows:

Damages: $68,820.70
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Efiling and service fee: $265.24

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $69,085.94

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Sep-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Attorney and Plaintiff Joseph Chan appeared via zoom.
Defendant Herman Kariuki not appearing.

After discussion with Mr. Chan, this matter is continued to August 20, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505. Mr. Chan is to provide the court with a courtesy copy of the claim and a summary of the ammounts claimed.

A witness is not required at the next hearing as Mr. Chan is the party named in the claim.
